Insights.Text: Switzerland won at home - 7/9 Last Matches

Items.Title: Mahrez retires from Algeria duty after World Cup exit
Items.Description: Algeria captain Riyad Mahrez announces his retirement from international football after the Desert Foxes’ 2-0 defeat by Switzerland in the World Cup round of 32.

Items.Title: Riyad Mahrez announces his international retirement
Items.Description: A legend takes a bow.In the wake of Algeria’s 2-0 defeat to Switzerland in the 2026 World Cup Round of 32 on Friday morning, Riyad Mahrez announced that he is retiring from international football!...

Items.Title: Switzerland beat Algeria to secure first World Cup knockout win in 88 years
Items.Description: Switzerland finally ended their World Cup knockout hoodoo by beating Algeria 2-0 to set up a last-16 meeting with either Colombia or Ghana.
